reference: No, it is not related to a growth spurt. Palpitations occur when heavy exercise or walking is done, which is physiological. After a cardiac check-up and electrocardiogram, if normal, then there is no need to worry.
text: No, it is not related to a growth spurt. Palpitations occur when heavy exercise or walking is done, which is physiological. After a cardiac checkup and electrocardiogram, if normal, then there is no need to worry.
